top_signals.title: Miami to Sell Griffin a Historic Site Next to New Citadel HQ
top_signals.summary: Miami agreed to sell Ken Griffin a site across the street from the planned Citadel headquarters in the Brickell financial district that currently houses an historic cottage, completing the billionaire’s goal of owning the entire square block.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Betting account in Cottrell’s name received $9mn in crypto from unidentified sources
top_signals.summary: Deposits in Polymarket wallet came as convicted fraudster was providing gifts to Farage
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Cerebras stock gains on AMD partnership
top_signals.summary: Cerebras and AMD agreed to work together, pairing their technology for AI systems.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
